Legal

Acceptable Use Policy

Last updated: 1 April 2026

This Acceptable Use Policy ("AUP") governs your use of the 0machine platform and associated services ("Service"), operated by Cooldelo Ltd. By using the Service, you agree to comply with this policy. Violations may result in suspension or termination of your account.

1. Permitted Use

0machine is intended for use by fabrication businesses, laser cutting studios, CNC operators, and related professional or hobbyist making operations for legitimate workflow management, including cost estimation, job tracking, client quoting, and material management.

2. Prohibited Activities

You must not use the Service to:

  • Violate any applicable local, national, or international law or regulation.
  • Transmit, store, or process any content that is illegal, defamatory, obscene, threatening, or fraudulent.
  • Infringe upon the intellectual property rights of any third party.
  • Reverse-engineer, decompile, disassemble, or attempt to extract the source code or algorithms of the Service.
  • Scrape, crawl, index, or systematically extract data from the Service without prior written consent.
  • Introduce malware, viruses, trojan horses, worms, logic bombs, or any other harmful software.
  • Perform denial-of-service attacks or any action that degrades the performance or availability of the Service for other users.
  • Attempt to gain unauthorized access to any accounts, systems, or networks connected to the Service.
  • Use the Service to resell, sublicense, or create competing products without our written permission.
  • Engage in any activity that constitutes spamming or sending unsolicited bulk communications.
  • Impersonate any person or entity, or misrepresent your affiliation with a person or entity.
  • Use automated tools to create multiple accounts or abuse free trials.

3. Content Standards

While 0machine does not publicly display user content, all content stored within the Service (project names, notes, client details, etc.) must not:

  • Include personally identifiable information of third parties without their consent.
  • Contain content that promotes discrimination, harassment, or hatred.
  • Include any information related to the production of weapons, explosives, or controlled substances.

4. Fair Use of Resources

You agree not to place unreasonable loads on our infrastructure. Automated scripts, bots, or integrations must respect reasonable rate limits. We reserve the right to throttle or block excessive usage that negatively impacts other users.

5. Reporting Violations

If you believe someone is violating this AUP, please report it to abuse@0machine.com. We investigate all reports and take appropriate action.

6. Security Reporting

We welcome responsible disclosure of security vulnerabilities. If you discover a security issue, please report it to security@0machine.com rather than publicly disclosing it. We aim to respond within 48 hours.

7. Consequences of Violation

Violation of this AUP may result in, at our sole discretion:

  • A warning and request to cease the offending activity.
  • Temporary suspension of your account.
  • Permanent termination of your account without refund.
  • Reporting to law enforcement or regulatory authorities where required.
  • Civil or legal action for damages.

8. Changes to This Policy

We may update this AUP from time to time. Material changes will be communicated via email or in-app notice at least 14 days before taking effect.

9. Contact

Questions about this policy?
📧 legal@0machine.com
